name: Gaming
hard_to_clip: Context required for non-gaming viewers; gameplay audio can be distracting.
lwa_automate: Audio spike detection as moment proxy; face-cam reaction crop

name: Podcast
hard_to_clip: Long context setup; meandering conversations; b-roll may be unavailable.
lwa_automate: Speaker identification; clip boundary detection at topic shifts; guest name lower-third

name: Business / Entrepreneurship
hard_to_clip: Long explanations needed for context; jargon can alienate general audience.
lwa_automate: Revenue number extraction for hook generation; transformation pattern detection

name: AI / Tech
clip_moments: I built this in X hours
hard_to_clip: Screen recordings need zoom/crop treatment; audio may be weak.
lwa_automate: Tool name extraction for hook generation; screen content crop assist

name: Medspa / Aesthetics
hard_to_clip: Medical claim risk is HIGH. Every clip needs compliance check before export.
lwa_automate: Before/after scene detection; medical claim language flagging; disclaimer injection

name: Fitness / Health
hard_to_clip: Needs high-quality video to show form. Gym audio noise is common.
lwa_automate: Visual change detection; noise filtering for gym audio; form cue overlay

name: Music
hard_to_clip: Rights issues common. Only clip creator-owned music content.
lwa_automate: Audio energy peak detection; beat drop timestamp extraction

name: Local Service Business
hard_to_clip: Variable production quality; owner is often the camera operator.
lwa_automate: Visual transformation detection; local identity extraction; simple CTA generation
